description: Phase 1B: Email Warm-up System. Add warm-up scheduling, gradual volume ramping (start 5/day, increase 20% daily), per-account warm-up tracking, auto-throttle on high bounce rates. Includes Prisma model, service, queue worker, API routes, and tests.
steps: 1. Add WarmupSchedule model to apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma: id, accountEmail, status (warming/paused/completed), startDate, currentDay, currentDailyLimit, maxDailyLimit, rampPercentage (default 20), sentToday, bouncedToday, bounceThreshold (default 5%), pausedReason?, createdAt, updatedAt. Add WarmupLog model: id, scheduleId, day, sent, bounced, delivered, date.
3. Add shared types: WARMUP_STATUS = ['warming', 'paused', 'completed'] in packages/shared/src/types/index.ts.

5. Create apps/api/src/services/warmup.ts: createWarmupSchedule(accountEmail, config), pauseWarmup(scheduleId), resumeWarmup(scheduleId), getWarmupProgress(scheduleId), tickWarmup() - called by cron to advance daily limits (increase by rampPercentage), auto-pause if bounceRate > threshold, recordWarmupSend(scheduleId), recordWarmupBounce(scheduleId), canSendFromAccount(accountEmail) - checks if warm-up limit allows more sends today.

6. Create apps/api/src/routes/warmup.ts: GET /api/warmup (list schedules), POST /api/warmup (create schedule), GET /api/warmup/:id (get with progress), PUT /api/warmup/:id (update config), POST /api/warmup/:id/pause, POST /api/warmup/:id/resume, GET /api/warmup/:id/logs (daily logs).
7. Register warmup routes in apps/api/src/index.ts behind requireAuth.
8. Update mockDb.ts with warmupSchedule and warmupLog models.
9. Add buildWarmupSchedule and buildWarmupLog to factories.ts.

10. Create apps/api/src/services/warmup.test.ts with tests for: schedule creation sets initial limit to 5, daily tick increases limit by 20%, auto-pause on high bounce rate, canSendFromAccount returns false when limit reached.
11. Create apps/api/src/routes/warmup.test.ts with full route test coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Warm-up schedule starts at 5 emails/day and increases by configurable percentage
Auto-pause triggers when bounce rate exceeds threshold
canSendFromAccount correctly limits sending during warm-up
Daily warm-up logs track sent/bounced/delivered per day
All route and service tests pass
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in apps/api to confirm no TypeScript errors
findings: All 626 tests pass (36 new warmup tests: 22 service + 14 route). No new TypeScript errors introduced (pre-existing errors in smtp-server.test.ts, email-sandbox.ts, simulation.test.ts, demo.pipeline.test.ts are unrelated). WarmupSchedule model starts at 5 emails/day with 20% daily ramp. Auto-pause triggers on bounce rate exceeding configurable threshold. warmupScheduleUpdateSchema uses partial/optional fields for PUT updates.
